features.name: coverageScore
features.label: Evidence Coverage
features.description: Higher means the agent has better recent traceable evidence coverage.

features.name: conflictScore
features.label: Evidence Conflict
features.description: Higher means bullish and bearish evidence are fighting each other.

features.name: freshnessHours
features.label: Evidence Freshness
features.description: Hours since the latest retained evidence was published.

features.name: trendState
features.label: Trend State
features.description: Deterministic trend-state computed from MA and return windows.

features.name: peBand
features.label: PE Band
features.description: Valuation bucket used by commander guardrails.

features.name: volatilityScore
features.label: Volatility Score
features.description: Risk score synthesized from ATR and turnover.
